owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. New approved direction: prove the smallest legal reactive policy-pack slice so a loaded mod can react in-session through precompiled branches.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: Owner-ready monthly reactive SNC contract now reaches real-session loop stdout, brief, and evidence; next bounded work is a concrete owner-facing playbook for the first monthly reactive Stellaris session test

chunks.title: Write monthly reactive owner test playbook
chunks.goal: Publish a concise owner-facing playbook that tells Antonin exactly how to perform the first monthly reactive real-session test once SNC and the loop surface `run_monthly_reactive_owner_test`.
acceptance: An owner-facing playbook or report template names the exact trigger (`run_monthly_reactive_owner_test`), what Antonin should do in Stellaris, and what evidence Codex will inspect afterward.
The playbook references the concrete harmless marker set and post-test artifacts already forwarded by SNC/real-session loop instead of paraphrased memory.
The wording explicitly keeps the current fail-closed limitation: this validates monthly reactive branch visibility, not full strategic quality.

chunks.title: Refresh progress after owner test playbook
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Task Board And Owner Report Log
chunks.goal: Keep roadmap notes, sprint queue, and today's owner-facing daily summary aligned after the owner-facing monthly reactive session test playbook lands.
acceptance: Roadmap notes mention the shipped owner-facing monthly reactive test playbook state.
The sprint queue advances to the next missing bounded roadmap slice instead of leaving completed lifecycle/reactive groundwork chunks as ready.
The daily freework report for 2026-06-06 is replaced, not duplicated.
